hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'lint-baseline\.xml|detekt-baseline\.xml'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"HARD RULE: Never update lint baselines to make CI pass. Fix the actual lint errors instead."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi
